title: Citrusy Chewy Mediterranean Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Mediterranean dish featuring chicken, star anise, and citrus, perfect for a solo dinner. This recipe combines the warmth of spices with the brightness of citrus for a truly satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the star anise, orange juice, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to the pot. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and let cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve solo as a satisfying and filling dinner.
